articles.title: Texas A&M Scientists Develop Anti-Aging Nasal Spray — Will the Longevity Cartel Bury This Breakthrough?
articles.summary: Texas A&M researchers developed a nasal spray that reversed brain aging in just two doses by calming inflammation and restoring energy systems. Memory and cognitive function improved for months, but watch how quickly the gerontology establishment tries to discredit this simple, non-pharmaceutical intervention.

articles.title: Peppermint Oil Crushes Blood Pressure — Big Pharma's $50 Billion ACE Inhibitor Market Under Threat
articles.summary: U.K. clinical trial found daily peppermint oil doses lowered blood pressure by 8.5 mmHg, rivaling prescription drugs. Natural compounds like menthol relax blood vessels without side effects, threatening the pharmaceutical industry's hypertension cash cow.

articles.title: The Serotonin Lie Exposed — How Big Pharma Manufactured the Depression Epidemic to Sell SSRIs
articles.summary: The serotonin deficiency theory of depression was crafted by pharmaceutical companies in the 1980s to market SSRIs, not discovered through science. A 2022 University College London meta-analysis found zero evidence supporting this foundational psychiatric fraud that's made billions.

articles.title: Elsevier Retracts SIDS-Vaccine Study — Can't Have Parents Asking Inconvenient Questions

articles.title: Neuroimaging Studies Fail External Validation — The Replication Crisis Hits Brain Research
